assertions.description: The USB differential pair (USB_P / USB_N) is correctly detected in both the sub-sheet and top-level analysis, but 'has_esd' is false in both cases. F2 (ESDUSB) is physically connected to USB_N and GND, and is a TVS diode array specifically designed for USB ESD protection. Because F2 is classified as 'fuse' instead of an ESD device, the has_esd check fails. The USB pair should show has_esd: true.
